name: NovaSpine Context Engine
description: NovaSpine context engine for OpenClaw with session-file ingestion and bounded envelope assembly across long-term memory, recent session, and workspace memory.

baseUrl.label: NovaSpine Base URL
baseUrl.help: HTTP endpoint for the NovaSpine API service.

autoRecall.label: Long-Term Recall
autoRecall.help: Include long-term NovaSpine recall inside the assembled context envelope.

sessionIngestOnBootstrap.label: Session Ingest On Bootstrap
sessionIngestOnBootstrap.help: Ingest the session transcript when OpenClaw boots a session.

sessionIngestOnAfterTurn.label: Session Ingest After Turn
sessionIngestOnAfterTurn.help: Refresh NovaSpine from the session transcript after each run.

mode.label: Assembly Mode
mode.help: Rebalance the working-set envelope between long-term memory and recent-session detail.

includeWorkspaceMemory.label: Workspace Memory
includeWorkspaceMemory.help: Include recent workspace memory markdown notes in the envelope.
